calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-27-2023 Single Assignment

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE - TRIAL COURTS
Off Calendar May-17-2023 Text Ruling

DEFENDANT TWITTER, INC.'S MOTION TO DISMISS THE COMPLAINT FOR FORUM NON CONVENIENS OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, MOTION TO STAY
Off Calendar May-24-2023 Off Calendar

Defendant Twitter, Inc.'S Notice Of Motion To Dismiss The Complaint For Forum Non Conveniens Or, In The Alternative, Motion To Stay
Off Calendar Apr-25-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant Twitter, Inc.'s Motion To Dismiss The Complaint For Forum Non Conveniens Or, In The Alternative, Motion To Stay.

Off calendar. The court sua sponte designates this case complex under CRC 3.400 et seq. and plaintiff's request for complex designation with its complaint. IT IS HEREBY ORDERED that this action is singly assigned for all purposes to the Complex Litigation Department 304, the Hon. Ethan Schulman, judge of the California Superior Court, City and County of San Francisco at 400 McAllister Street, San Francisco, CA 94102. Department 304 will issue a subsequent order regarding scheduling and complex department procedures.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)
